name: Button
description: Pill-shaped actions with seven flat, quiet variants.

name: Badge
description: Compact status pills in soft intent colors.

name: Input
description: A pill text field with a hairline border and a blue focus ring.

name: Textarea
description: Multi-line input matching the field style.

name: Label
description: An accessible, selectable form label.

name: Checkbox
description: A rounded tile that fills solid blue with a check.

name: Radio Group
description: Single-select circles that light up with a blue dot.

name: Switch
description: A flat iOS-style toggle with a white thumb.

name: Slider
description: A quiet track with a blue range and a white thumb.

name: Select
description: A clean dropdown with highlighted items.

name: Card
description: The signature surface: white, hairline border, soft shadow.

name: Alert
description: Quiet callouts in four intents.

name: Separator
description: A hairline divider for sections.

name: Avatar
description: A rounded image with a graceful fallback.

name: Dialog
description: A clean modal floating over a blurred scrim.

name: Popover
description: A floating panel anchored to a trigger.

name: Tooltip
description: A small hint shown on hover or focus.

name: Tabs
description: A segmented pill switcher with a raised active tab.

name: Accordion
description: Collapsible sections with a smooth height transition.

name: Progress
description: A quiet track with a solid blue fill.

name: Skeleton
description: A pulsing placeholder for loading content.

name: Spinner
description: A minimal loading spinner.

name: Circular Gauge
description: An animated ring gauge with a soft glow.

name: Orb
description: A soft pastel glow orb for AI moments and hero backdrops.

name: Alert Dialog
description: A clean modal that interrupts for a confirmation.

name: Sheet
description: A panel that slides in from any edge.

name: Hover Card
description: A card revealed on hover or focus.

name: Dropdown Menu
description: A crisp menu of actions, with submenus and checks.

name: Context Menu
description: A right-click menu, clean and quiet.

name: Menubar
description: A desktop-style bar of dropdown menus.

name: Navigation Menu
description: Site navigation with floating dropdown panels.

name: Command
description: A searchable command palette.

name: Combobox
description: A searchable select in a clean popover.

name: Toggle
description: A two-state button with a soft pressed look.

name: Toggle Group
description: A segmented set of toggles in a pill rail.

name: Input OTP
description: Minimal one-time-code cells.

name: Input Group
description: An input fused with leading or trailing add-ons.

name: Field
description: Label, control, hint, and error, grouped.

name: Native Select
description: A styled native select, no JS required.

name: Collapsible
description: A single open-and-close disclosure.

name: Breadcrumb
description: A path trail back to the top.

name: Pagination
description: Page-by-page navigation controls.

name: Scroll Area
description: A scroll container with a slim, quiet bar.

name: Aspect Ratio
description: Hold content to a fixed ratio.

name: Table
description: A clean, rounded data table.

name: Empty
description: A friendly empty state.

name: Item
description: A composable list row.

name: Kbd
description: A keyboard-key badge.

name: Button Group
description: Buttons joined into one segmented control.

name: Toast
description: Transient notifications that slide in and stack.

name: Meter
description: A semantic gauge whose fill shifts across thresholds.

name: Calendar
description: A clean month grid with a solid blue selected day.

name: Date Picker
description: A pill date field with a popover calendar.

name: Rating
description: Fillable symbols for a quick score.

name: Tags Input
description: A field that collects entries as soft pill chips.

name: Carousel
description: A swipeable slider with pill prev/next controls.

name: Resizable
description: Draggable panes split by a quiet handle.

name: Data Table
description: A sortable, selectable, paginated table.

name: Timeline
description: A vertical history with softly glowing markers.

name: Sidebar
description: A collapsible app sidebar that folds to a slim rail.

name: Stepper
description: A multi-step progress trail with quiet nodes.

name: Tree
description: A nested, keyboard-navigable file-style tree.

name: Dock
description: A dock that magnifies icons under the cursor.

name: Aurora
description: A slow, drifting pastel-aura backdrop.
